role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and forest type; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (oak, scrub); stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and infrastructure; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed camera artifacts and general road style; stayed within domain.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed because the agents relied on a 'double yellow line' heuristic that is factually incorrect for the ground truth (Greece). The agents hallucinated that double yellow lines are exclusive to North America, ignoring their common use in Europe. This led to a systematic misclassification.

regulatory: landscape agent: 'double yellow center line is a standard North American road marking' (implies exclusivity, ignoring European usage)
regulatory agent: 'absence of European-style roadside bollards' (implies European roads always have them)
meta agent: 'double yellow center line is a standard North American road marking' (repeated false exclusivity claim)
meta: meta agent: 'lack of European-style delineator posts... inconsistent with typical European rural coverage' (false generalization)

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the forest and soil.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the road markings, but misinterpreted their regulatory meaning.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Greece was not in the candidate pool. The agents' hallucination regarding road markings led them to exclude Europe entirely.
